purpose: Question guide for extracting article-level KNIME workflow reporting evidence into article_audit_fields.
principles: Use description_audit_fields for traceability labels, source identifiers, and conservative textual classifications.

For records where knime_article_relation is about_knime, keep descriptive metadata but leave flag_audit_fields and flag_audit_support empty because these background/platform articles are not part of the deeper workflow-reporting audit.
Use flag_audit_fields only for presence flags where true means the item is present in the current evidence.

Use flag_audit_support only for true flags. For article-text support, citation objects should contain extracted_text_lines, quote, article_section, and note. The quote is direct article wording from the extracted text; the note is an audit explanation.
Do not create true flags for no, not_applicable, not_assessed, unclear, or not_checked states; preserve those states as description fields.

After finding a candidate quote, check whether the quote really supports the idea behind the flag and answers the audit question. If it does, keep it as support. If it does not, try to find another quote. If more than five candidate quotes have been checked and all are wrong, and no quote supports the answer, set the flag answer to false.

article_identifier.question: What is the article identifier used to link this assessment to the bibliographic source record?
article_identifier.source: OpenAlex top-cited CSV or equivalent bibliographic source

title.question: What is the article title?
title.source: OpenAlex top-cited CSV or article metadata

year.question: What is the publication year?
year.source: OpenAlex top-cited CSV or article metadata

venue.question: What is the publication venue or source?
venue.source: OpenAlex top-cited CSV or article metadata

doi_or_url.question: What DOI or stable URL identifies the article?
doi_or_url.source: OpenAlex top-cited CSV or article metadata

knime_role_source_field.question: What detailed manual role label was assigned before simplification?

knime_article_relation.question: Is the article about KNIME, does it use KNIME, is it not a KNIME use case, or was it not assessed?

knime_version_values.question: Which KNIME version value or values does the article report?
knime_version_values.source: Article text or manual assessment notes

workflow_artifact_status.question: How does the article present KNIME workflow artifacts?
workflow_artifact_status.source: Manual assessment of article text, figures, supplements, and links

provides_input_data.question: How does the article report input data availability?
provides_input_data.source: Article availability statements, methods, supplements, and resource links

provides_code_or_scripts.question: How does the article report code or script availability?
provides_code_or_scripts.source: Article availability statements, methods, supplements, and resource links

reports_extension_or_plugin_dependencies.question: How does the article report KNIME extension or plugin dependencies?
reports_extension_or_plugin_dependencies.source: Article text, named nodes/components, software availability notes, and resource links

reports_extension_installation_source.question: How does the article report where or how required KNIME extensions/plugins can be obtained?
reports_extension_installation_source.source: Article text, update-site information, software URLs, and availability notes

linked_workflow_artifacts_retrievable.question: What is known about whether linked KNIME workflow artifacts are still retrievable?
linked_workflow_artifacts_retrievable.source: Current project notes and any documented retrieval checks

evidence_notes.question: What short note explains the reproducibility relevance and evidence basis for this article?

full_text_accessible.question: Was the article full text accessible for assessment?

uses_knime.question: Does the article use KNIME as part of a study, workflow, comparison, interface, or implementation?

reports_knime_version.question: Does the article report a KNIME version?

provides_downloadable_knime_workflow_fil.question: Does the article provide or link downloadable KNIME workflow files?

provides_workflow_screenshots_or_figures.question: Does the article include screenshots or figures showing KNIME workflows?

describes_workflow_or_nodes_in_text.question: Does the article describe KNIME workflow steps, nodes, modules, or components in text?

provides_input_data_direct_url.question: Does the assessment record a direct URL or resource pointer for input data?

reports_input_data_availability.question: Does the article report input data availability, including direct resources or availability statements without direct URLs?

provides_code_or_scripts.question: Does the article provide or link code, scripts, or a code repository relevant to the reported work?

reports_extension_or_plugin_dependencies.question: Does the article report KNIME extension/plugin dependencies or named KNIME node-library dependencies?

reports_extension_installation_source.question: Does the article report an installation source, update site, project URL, or other source for required KNIME extensions/plugins?

linked_workflow_artifacts_retrievable.question: Were linked KNIME workflow artifacts documented as retrievable in current project notes?
